zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham於1361年出生在英國素福爾可布萊時，她的父親John Heveningham37歲，母親Joanne Gyssinge27歲。她於1381年與John Berney在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利德哈姆享年99歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham于1361年出生在英国素福爾可布萊时，她的父亲John Heveningham37岁，母亲Joanne Gyssinge27岁。她于1381年与John Berney在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国英格兰諾福爾可利德哈姆享年99岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham was born in 1361, in Blything, Suffolk, England, her father, John Heveningham, was 37 and her mother, Joanne Gyssinge, was 27. She married John Berney in 1381, in Reedham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1460, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 99, and was buried in Reedham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham est née en 1361, à Blything, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Heveningham, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joanne Gyssinge, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Berney en 1381, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham 1361 in Blything, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Heveningham 37 und ihre Mutter Joanne Gyssinge 27. Sie hat 1381 in Reedham, Norfolk, England John Berney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Reedham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham è nata il nel 1361 nel Blything, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Heveningham, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Joanne Gyssinge, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Berney nel 1381, nel Reedham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Reedham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolta a Reedham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Elizabeth Heveninghamが1361年にイギリススフォルクブリスイングで生まれた時，父John Heveninghamは37歳，母Joanne Gyssingeは27歳であった。1381年にイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムでJohn Berneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで99歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクレエドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham(이)가 1361년 영국 수폴크 블리스잉에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Heveningham(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanne Gyssinge(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 노르폴크 리드함에서 John Berney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리드함에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 리드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham nasceu em 1361, em Blything, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Heveningham, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joanne Gyssinge, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Berney em 1381, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 99 anos, e foi sepultada em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham родилась в 1361 г. в местности блитинг, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Heveningham было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanne Gyssinge, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Berney в 1381 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham nació en 1361, en Blything, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Heveningham, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joanne Gyssinge, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Berney en 1381, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultada en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
